{{CargoRelic
|name=Sitar
|class_id=22463
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|birthday=05-22
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.25%)
|description=On May 22, 1960 AD, Sitar master Ravi performed on stage with The Beatles.<br>The Sitar, India's most iconic musical instrument, is renowned for its intricate playing style. It features seven primary strings and eleven sympathetic strings, with a resonating chamber at the end. Master musicians even craft custom sitars with dual resonators. The instrument's complexity can intimidate even the most seasoned players.
|fame=34
|art=30
|fth=26
|civ=45
|tech=19
|ss1=Per 3 basic fusions, Snail RUSH +1<br>Basic Fusions: 150/150
|ss2=Per 3 basic fusions, Snail RUSH +2<br>Basic Fusions: 150/150
|ss3=Per 3 basic fusions, Snail RUSH +3<br>Basic Fusions: 150/150
|ss4=Per 3 basic fusions, Snail RUSH +5<br>Basic Fusions: 150/150
|ss7=Per 3 basic fusions, Snail RUSH +5<br>Basic Fusions: 150/150<br>Snail RUSH +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill I.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Orange Card Drops +1%
}}
